description:
Why Europe's new highway megaproject is in a sticky situation.
🔥 Pre-order Fred's book MEGA BUILDS now 👉 https://bit.ly/3Y63G6X

Full story here - https://theb1m.com/video/second-gotthard-road-tunnel

0:00 Intro
0:56 Swiss Infrastructure
2:15 Gotthard Road Tunnel  
3:23 Time for Another
4:40 Tunnelling Methods  
6:45 Complex Geology
8:13 Getting Prepared
9:58 A False Start
12:00 Weighing the Risks
13:51 Other Benefits
15:00 The Traffic Issue

Additional footage and images: Swiss Confederation, Marti Gruppe, ETH Library Zurich, Kecko, Myoungho Shin, Nicola Demaldi, Olaf Arndt, Snowy Hydro and Valentin Luthiger.

For more from Marti Gruppe visit - https://www.youtube.com/@UC86jHZtAxTyLSDj7U9ZFDGQ
